projects.name: Transformer From Scratch
projects.visualSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 300 100"><rect x="20" y="30" width="50" height="40" rx="4" fill="none" stroke="var(--acid)" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="125" y="15" width="50" height="70" rx="4" fill="none" stroke="var(--acid)" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="230" y="30" width="50" height="40" rx="4" fill="none" stroke="var(--acid)" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="70" y1="50" x2="125" y2="50" stroke="var(--violet)" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="175" y1="50" x2="230" y2="50" stroke="var(--violet)" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg>
projects.desc: Full "Attention Is All You Need" architecture, implemented line-by-line — Multi-Head Self-Attention, Positional Encoding, LayerNorm, residual connections, and complete encoder-decoder blocks, with zero reliance on high-level transformer libraries.

arch.label: Embedding
arch.tip: Tokens mapped to dense vector representations.

arch.label: Multi-Head Attention
arch.tip: 8 heads attend to different parts of the sequence in parallel.

projects.name: NADS — Anomaly Detection
projects.desc: End-to-end MLOps pipeline for real-time network anomaly detection. Trained an unsupervised Autoencoder on 2.5M+ CIC-IDS2017 flow records across 78 features, streamed through Kafka for low-latency inference.

projects.name: FlowBERT
projects.visualSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 300 100"><circle cx="150" cy="50" r="30" fill="none" stroke="var(--violet)" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="80" cy="50" r="16" fill="none" stroke="var(--acid)" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="220" cy="50" r="16" fill="none" stroke="var(--acid)" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="96" y1="50" x2="120" y2="50" stroke="var(--acid)"/><line x1="180" y1="50" x2="204" y2="50" stroke="var(--acid)"/></svg>
projects.desc: Multi-task fine-tuned DistilBERT for simultaneous department classification + urgency prediction, cutting manual ticket triage effort by 75%.

experience.org: Ordnance Clothing Factory (OCF), Shahjahanpur · Ministry of Defence Summer Internship Program
desc: Selected among undergraduate applicants nationwide for a Ministry of Defence-sponsored internship on AI-driven textile defect detection.
Building computer vision pipelines to identify tears, stains, stitching defects, and color inconsistencies on production fabric.
Applying image preprocessing, feature extraction, and deep learning for industrial quality inspection automation.
Collaborating directly with defense production engineers and QA teams on real manufacturing datasets.

timeline.title: Started B.Tech CS @ VIT Bhopal
timeline.desc: First lines of Python, first "hello world," first all-nighter.

timeline.title: OpenCV & classical ML projects
timeline.desc: Built early computer vision projects, fell in love with the "why does this work" question.

timeline.title: Transformers, LLMs & FlowBERT
timeline.desc: Reimplemented Attention Is All You Need, fine-tuned DistilBERT for ticket triage.

timeline.title: Ministry of Defence Internship
timeline.desc: Selected for AI-driven textile defect detection at OCF Shahjahanpur.

timeline.title: Next: AI Engineer
